channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping…. Consistently there, 26th April
item.description:
Seems like an ongoing issue….

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenarm Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin near the Moon Under Water, 26th April
item.description:
Overflowing bin and dumped rubbish on the corner of Chase Side Avenue/Nunns Road by the Moon Under Water.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nunns Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 26th April
item.description:
Pothole or damaged paving blocks in the road surface at brick paver raised pavement crossing. Been painted over with give way marking.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 272, Brixton Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Risk of drowning sign missing, 26th April
item.description:
The risk of drowning signs are missing for the posts by the steps down to the river Poole. Please can they be reinstated?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Montana Gardens, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging vegetation, 26th April
item.description:
The plants on the south side of the road are over hanging causing cars to drive in the middle of the road when driving into the road from the main street at the end. This is especially a problem when the rail replacement buses or larger vehicles come in.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1a, Lower Station Road, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees/bushes overhanging on narrow pavement, 26th April
item.description:
The pavement along Perry Street has overgrown trees/bushes on the horse field side. The pavement is already quite narrow and it is a a busy main road. Large lorries/trucks use it and it is getting quite dangerous walking along that side trying to dodge the overhang.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti and flyposting on recycling container, 26th April
item.description:
Green recycling container covered in graffiti tags and a flyposter for a table sale.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bethwin Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp dim, 26th April
item.description:
Lamp dim - number 3

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 228, Camberwell New Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin area Swan mead, 26th April
item.description:
We found the mixed flytiping on the pavement of bin area. So please clean it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bushbaby Close, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light out under railway bridge on Camberwell New Rd, 26th April
item.description:
Street light is out under the railway bridge on Camberwell New Rd. The light fixture on the column is not illuminated at night.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 342, Camberwell New Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp dim, 26th April
item.description:
Lamps dim all along camberwell new road, the lamps have gone blue and lost their power

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 224, Camberwell New Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tall street light not functioning., 26th April
item.description:
The tall street light not operating on Evelina Road is located close against southeast side of rail bridge next to car repair garage and where former car wash (now closed) was sited under rail bridge arch.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Evelina Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 Donaldson Road, 26th April
item.description:
Can of beers and diff drinks on pavement and road outside 2 Donaldson and 4 Donaldson on the road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on street cabinet, 26th April
item.description:
TfL Street cabinet covered in white spray paint graffiti. Located on the pavement near the traffic lights at the junction of Camberwell Church St and Grove Lane. Non-offensive tagging.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wood posts have been knocked over on roundabout, 26th April
item.description:
The roundabout at the end of Cranbrook close is to large for how small the road is, the council fitted wooden posts on the perimeter of the roundabout however they are knocked over all the time due to larger vehicles driving down the road eg (dustcarts).
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cranbrook Close, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked driveway double yellow blips, 26th April
item.description:
Also Blocking emergency access and road passing point.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose cycle stand, 26th April
item.description:
Loose cycle stand on the pavement near double red lines, can be lifted out of the ground

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mowll Street, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Pavement Defect (uneven surface / cracked paving slab)

item.title: Abandoned bicycle locked to cycle stand, 26th April
item.description:
A black bicycle (Pegasus brand) is locked to a cycle stand on the pavement. It appears to be abandoned as there is a significant accumulation of leaves, twigs, and debris around the rear wheel and the base of the stand. The rear tire appears to be flat and it is missing a seat.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brixton Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian signal head facing wrong direction, 26th April
item.description:
Pedestrian signal head facing the wrong direction (turned around).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coldharbour Lane, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: Pen tags on the blue double doors on the High St frontage of Penge Sainsburys., 26th April
item.description:
Pen tags on the blue double doors on the High St frontage of Penge Sainsburys.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 158 - 162, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
